message:
fix(replay): honor halt_on_first config in evidence replay divergence checks

Add early return when config.halt_on_first is set after detecting
divergence in action, calibration_score, and chosen_expected_loss
fields. Previously these checks would continue comparing subsequent
fields even when halt_on_first was enabled, producing noisy
multi-field divergence reports when the first mismatch was the
only actionable finding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
